summary: Iteration 38: Bug fix testing for video_url field in est_help_topics. Fixed syntax error in establishment/dashboard.tsx and admin/dashboard.tsx. All backend tests pass (11/11). Frontend video_url functionality verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed syntax error in /app/frontend/app/establishment/dashboard.tsx - extra closing brace in try block (line 110)
Fixed missing </View> closing tag in /app/frontend/app/admin/dashboard.tsx - client sub-tab section was missing closing View tag before line 2002
seed_data_creation: Test topics with TEST_ prefix created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Video URL functionality in est_help_topics is fully working. The video_url field is stored in each FAQ topic (not in a separate collection). Admin can add/edit video URLs via the FAQ Estabelecimento form. The help page shows 'Inclui video' badge and embeds YouTube/Vimeo videos when expanded.

backend: POST /api/admin/est-help-topics creates topic with video_url field
PUT /api/admin/est-help-topics/{id} updates video_url of existing topic
GET /api/est-help-topics returns topics with video_url field
Admin role required for create/update operations
video_url field is optional (empty string when not set)
frontend: Admin > FAQ > FAQ Estabelecimento > form includes 'URL do video' input field
Admin > FAQ > FAQ Estabelecimento > list shows 'Video vinculado' badge when topic has video_url
Admin > FAQ > saving topic with video_url works and topic persists in list
/establishment/help shows FAQ topics with 'Inclui video' badge when video_url is set
/establishment/help expanding topic with video shows embedded YouTube/Vimeo player
Dashboard has 'Centro de Aprendizado' section with 'Como Usar - Assista aos Videos' button
